page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sgn8ia-m48.24xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by an AMD EPYC 9T34 processor. The system features 96 dedicated physical cores running at a clock speed of 3.4 GHz, with a configuration of one thread per core. This dedicated CPU allocation is paired with 384.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

For accelerated workloads, the instance includes a single NVIDIA Ada Lovelace architecture GPU equipped with 48 GB of VRAM. This server does not feature any local NVMe or SSD storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 32 Gbps, managed under a KVM hypervisor.

The hardware profile represents a high-density compute and GPU-accelerated configuration. The dedicated physical core allocation eliminates hyper-threading resource sharing, ensuring predictable CPU execution. However, the lack of local storage requires relying on network storage, which may introduce latency tradeoffs depending on the storage tier selected. The qualitative cost efficiency is defined by the high-capacity VRAM and dedicated CPU resources, making it structured for workloads requiring consistent compute and graphics acceleration without local storage dependencies.

This instance is designed for workloads such as machine learning inference, graphics rendering, data science pipelines, and compute-heavy tasks that benefit from dedicated AMD EPYC cores and NVIDIA Ada Lovelace GPU acceleration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sgn8ia-m48.24xlarge is an x86_64 server instance featuring 96 dedicated AMD EPYC 9T34 physical cores operating at 3.4 GHz with a single thread per core. It is equipped with 384.0 GB of system memory, yielding 4.0 GB of RAM per core, and integrates a single NVIDIA Ada Lovelace GPU with 48 GB of VRAM. The instance operates on a KVM hypervisor and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps. Notably, the server lacks local storage, requiring network-attached storage solutions. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures predictable performance by avoiding hyper-threading overhead. This hardware configuration is suited for GPU-accelerated workloads, machine learning inference, and compute-intensive tasks requiring dedicated processing power and substantial video memory.
